title: Decompose into Services or Modules
description: Find good boundaries for splitting a system.
content:
Help me decompose this system into modules/services: {{system}}

Find boundaries along the seams of change and ownership, not just nouns. For each proposed module: its single responsibility, what it owns, its interface, and its dependencies. Watch for chatty boundaries and shared databases. Tell me honestly whether this should stay a monolith with clean internal modules instead of being split.
